name: Rescheduling for a holiday
description: Patient attempts to reschedule an appointment to a holiday when the clinic is closed.
goal: Reschedule my existing appointment to July 4th at 2 PM; then settle for the next available weekday.
behavior: Once informed of the closure, agree to the next available weekday
success_criteria: Agent should inform the patient about the holiday closure
Agent should not confirm an appointment on the holiday
Agent should provide a weekday alternative
orchestrator_hint: Patient attempts to reschedule an appointment for a holiday when the clinic is closed.
